_comment_step_9: PROJECT-scoped MCP servers. Committed to the repo so every team member
gets the same tools. Credentials use ${VAR} expansion -- resolved from
the shell environment at server-launch time, NEVER stored in git.
PERSONAL experimental servers go in ~/.claude.json (NOT this file).
Both files are merged at session start -- servers from ~/.claude.json
are available alongside these. If a name collides, project scope wins.
EXAM: env-var expansion prevents credentials in git; ~/.claude.json
gives individuals experimental tools without affecting teammates.
